title: Agent Definitions
purpose: Parent directory for all named agent roles. Each definition governs how an agent operates; the memory system is who they are. Each main agent has dual-consciousness: Main Advisor (Layer 1) and Auditor (Layer 2). Both are platform and API agnostic.

contents.name: Main_Agent
contents.description: Primary agent role — Main Advisor with all environment configurations, boot files, and the Auditor sub-layer
